title: Hide The Bedrock
description:
A Minecraft texture pack that change the bedrock texture to the deepslate texture

Searching the mod version? : Not published yet.
body:
⚠️Warning⚠️
This texture pack is **NOT** finsh, there will be changes in the futur

This texture pack change the bedrock texture to the deepslate texture with some difference, this is a great texture pack for streamer that stream on popular SMP
